placements.overview: Seven Hills College Of Pharmacy is located in Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh. The institute offers courses like B.Pharma, M.Pharma and Pharm.D. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 6 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

review_summary.college_name: Seven Hills College Of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Seven Hills College of Pharmacy, where we can upskill ourselves to the sky's limit.

content.Placements: Nearly 90% of the students are placed in our course during college placements. The highest package varies from year to year, but it is around 4-5 LPA, and the lowest package is 1.2 LPA. On average, many students get around 2.5 LPA. A company like Apollo Hospital recruits more. Internships are provided to all the students through the college management itself in a government hospital. The roles offered are clinical pharmacist, SAS coder, pharmacovigilance, and medical coding.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides free library access at any time during college hours. There is a computer lab facility and free high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity across the college. The food that is present in the hostel is okay. They encourage more sports activities and participate in local tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Nice college for pharmacy.

content.Placements: Placements are good and many people are placed in college itself. But some people grab the opportunity and some are again joined in the same college as M.Pharma students. Out of 100, 80% of students are placed in that placement itself. No worry about it.
content.Infrastructure: Several facilities are available at the college like Wi-Fi, labs, library, and an area to play cricket. Hostel is okay. Food in the canteen is good. Once a week every class has a separate sports hour to play sports and they provide bats and balls.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Seven Hills College of Pharmacy - Great for education.

content.Placements: The Pharma.D (doctor of pharmacy) course is a 6 year professional program, which includes 5 years of academic studies and 1 year of internship. This mainly comprises patient care, clinical pharmacy, drug therapy, and hospital-based therapy. Usually, each batch contains 30 members per year. Mostly top companies like Apollo and Dr. Reddy's have recruited most of our seniors. Mostly pharmacovigilance, clinical pharmacist, and medical coding are the top offers in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The rooms in our college are facilitated with great infrastructure like Wi-Fi and labs with great equipments and chemical for the experiments to conduct. Also classrooms have great digital board teaching and we have a library where we have almost thousands of books regarding pharmacy.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great education, safe campus, good faculty, placements, digital classes, events & activities.

content.Placements: There are many companies that come to our college and almost 80% of students get placed in the placement. Companies in the pharma and medical coding field are most in placement. For Pharma.D students good hospital collaborates for internship. Students are satisfied with these placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is availability of a library at any time and labs have good equipment for the experiments. We also have access to digital books from the library. The hostel is very safe for girls and they provide all facilities. They also provide sports equipment and certain times for sports during college hours. We can also go to the gym zone if interested.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is awesome, you can enjoy a better, happier life here.

content.Placements: Many of us got good placements in best Pharma companies, including Apollo Pharmacy, and it also provides the ideas needed for walk-in drives. Many industries will come for placement, like AGS Tirupati and some companies from Bangalore, Chennai, and every other place.
content.Infrastructure: A big library with many computers is available, and we also have a computer lab. You will get free Wi-Fi and water facilities there. For hostelers, especially for girls, it is very safe because the hostel is within the college premises only, so there is no need to travel long for that.

admission_overview.college_name: Seven Hills College Of Pharmacy Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Seven Hills College Of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Seven Hills College Of Pharmacy admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Seven Hills College Of Pharmacyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asAP EAMCET, AP PGECET, and GPAT. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,20,000 - 3,90,000for UG, PG and Doctorate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: College with knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The classes in our college are very good. We have enough benches to sit and we have many classes in our college for separate courses. We have many fans in our college so we can feel free and not suffocating. We feel safe in our college because our faculty members take care of everything and they treat us as well.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Seven Hills College of Pharmacy had very good food and hostel facilities, and we had a lot of labs, such as pharmacology, analysis, chemistry, inorganic chemistry, medicinal chemistry, pharmacognosy, and pharmaceutics labs were available, and it was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for pharmacy students.
reviews.review_text: Separate classrooms and laboratory are available. And also provide the pharmaceutical and analytical instruments like HPLC, UV, colorimeter, compressor, dryer, coating machines, punching machines and also many more instruments are used for the experiments purpose. And also provide separate animal house. Coming to the hostel food and accommodation is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Seven Hills College Of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is topnotch, with all the facilities, labs and spacious classrooms with projectors for virtual teaching. Hostel facilities are provided by the college management for non-locals, which fulfills everyone's needs. Sports are usually conducted on weekends, subject related seminars, and other 
motivational seminars to encourage the students to face society.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with less courses and a peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories are very well established and equipped. There are different laboratories for different subjects. Wi-Fi is available and the library has every book that students need except some books. The hostel and mess are clean with edible food. Rooms are clean with cupboards and ventilation.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members, a peaceful atmosphere and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It is a well-built institution with a separate hostel facility for boys and girls. The hostels are spacious and air-conditioned. Sports are conducted on Saturday weekly once. The canteen is available with good quality food. Medical facilities are available to provide first aid for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our faculty, course and placements.
reviews.review_text: There are labs and Wi-Fi facility is available in classrooms. The college also has a library and gym. The hostel is allocated to outsiders who wants hostel and the food served is a bit better.  Both indoor and outdoor games are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good because of faculty, good placement, good infrastructure, lab facilities.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very big, labs with AC, equipments, AC libraries with good amount of books, a lot of journals for students. Computer facilities with free Wi-Fi. Hostel is adjacent to college. Canteen is good of quality. Medical facilities are available on time at the hostel. Sports is given one of the best part in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the college if anyone thinking to get into the college.
reviews.review_text:
Fully AC room of hostel with geyser facility and 3 times food facility with eveng tea..
Weekly twice non veg
Veg and non veg. Separately served with clean and hygienic...RO water facilities available and full security and is under 24×7 CCTV Surveillance

reviews.review_heading: Our college feels good in everything.
reviews.review_text: College buildings, classrooms, playgrounds, libraries, toilets, drinking water facilities, lab, art craft room, etc. are spacious and refurnished buildings with well-ventilated classrooms. Hostel facilities were good but the canteen food was average.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Contai Polytechnic College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.question: Which specializations can I find in the programs offered at Contai Polytechnic College?
faqs.answer: Contai Polytechnic College offers various courses like D.Pharma, After 10th Diploma in Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering stream. Contai Polytechnic College has specializations such as Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for courses at Contai Polytechnic College?
faqs.answer: The fees structure for programs offerred by the Contai Polytechnic College is INR 1780 - INR 1800.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Contai Polytechnic College?
faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at Contai Polytechnic College goes up to 390. Courses offerred by Contai Polytechnic College are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science and Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the best college in West Bengal.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students were placed in our course. The highest is around 7.5 LPA, the lowest is about 2.5 LPA and the average package is between 3 LPA and 4 LPA offered in our course. Infosys, TCS, Wipro, etc. are companies recruiting for our course. 95% of students got internships through our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has very clear, advanced, and a good atmosphere in our facilities. The infrastructure is very advanced. Boys' and girls' hostels are very clean, big, and have a good atmosphere. The quality of hostel food is also very good, and our college's mess and canteens are great, with various kinds of food always available. We also have an indoor sports room and a gym that are both very advanced.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science and Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best polytechnic college for doing a diploma in computer science and technology.

review_content.Placements: Contai Polytechnic provides around 60-70 percent of placements, but there are some terms to get shortlisted, as the students shouldn't have an active supply (backlog). The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. Good startups and small companies visit the college to hire students. 90 percent of students got internships from here. 10 percent of students are not able to get shortlisted due to criteria like low attendance, etc. There are no public records of top roles offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent here. They use high specification PCs and teach with digital boards. There is also free Wi-Fi for students. There are separate Wi-Fi connections for laptop users. The library has all the up-to-date books and a huge collection of books for all courses. The library card system they use is old. Most of the time, the company provides a dormitory room with a personal locker and also provides 3 meals per day, which include breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My college has a very good campus, good faculty, and good placement.

review_content.Placements: The college offers 100% placement. The highest package is 4 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Companies like L&T and TATA Motors, etc., recruit students. 100% of students from our college get internships, and 90% of them are placed in companies offering good roles. Top roles are offered by the companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good. Classrooms are very good, and smart classrooms are available in the college. The library is good. The college hostel is of high quality, and the food is very tasty and healthy. The canteen is very good, and all types of food are available. Medicine is available, and sports facilities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science and Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our faculty is very good and helpful. Infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: Many reputed companies are offering jobs with 85% placements, such as Rashmi, HPL, and Aditya Birla. The college arranged a job fair for more placements. It is one of the best diploma engineering college. Its placement rate is 85%, with a minimum salary package of 2 LPA. This is the most favorable aspect. Now, our college is very popular.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities in labs, the library, classrooms, and smart classrooms. Canteen is available. The hostel has 200 seats with good food, water, and electricity. The campus is large with a garden and strong women’s safety. The environment is student-friendly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: CONTAI POLYTECHNIC.

review_content.Placements: If you have a score of 9 GPA and above 80%, you will be able to get a good package in college, like 25k to 45k per month. And average students whose packages are 14k to 19k per month. If your skills are good, companies will allow you into a high position. Companies are Bajaj, Aditya Birla Group, TATA Motors, Suzuki & Maruti.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are too good in length and size, faculties are allowed to connect with students, principals are too good at helping and treating students with patience. Hostel food is available,and mess food is also available. Medical facilities are also available. Annual tournaments and cultural programs are hosted in college cricket, football, badminton, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My amazing experience at Contai Polytechnic.

review_content.Placements: I am a current student at contai Polytechnic, pursuing a diploma in electronics engineering. The average placement scenario with approximately 80% of students in renowned companies. In our course, the highest package offered is 8 lacs per annum, the lowest is 3.6 lacs per annum, and the average package stands at 5 lacs. The top recruiting companies in our college is Siemens, Schneider electric, Tata power etc. Near about 70% of students secured internships in same companies. About 70% of students get placements in companies like Siemens, thought works, Wipro, blue star, and so on. They play the job role of an analyst, an assistant design engineer and as a communication engineer etc. Students also get internships in these companies on their own. They also earn stipend from these internships.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college in West Bengal.

content.Placements: 95% of students were placed in our course. The highest is around 7.5 LPA, the lowest is about 2.5 LPA and the average package is between 3 LPA and 4 LPA offered in our course. Infosys, TCS, Wipro, etc. are companies recruiting for our course. 95% of students got internships through our course.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very clear, advanced, and a good atmosphere in our facilities. The infrastructure is very advanced. Boys' and girls' hostels are very clean, big, and have a good atmosphere. The quality of hostel food is also very good, and our college's mess and canteens are great, with various kinds of food always available. individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best polytechnic college for doing a diploma in computer science and technology.

content.Placements: Contai Polytechnic provides around 60-70 percent of placements, but there are some terms to get shortlisted, as the students shouldn't have an active supply (backlog). The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. Good startups and small companies visit the college to hire students. 90 percent of students got internships from here. 10 percent of students are not able to get shortlisted due to criteria like low attendance, etc. There are no public records of top roles offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent here. They use high specification PCs and teach with digital boards. There is also free Wi-Fi for students. There are separate Wi-Fi connections for laptop users. The library has all the up-to-date books and a huge collection of books for all courses. The library card system they use is old. faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the college facilities and the staff members.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students get placed in our course. Top roles like HR and auditor are offered. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, and Football visit the college to hire students from our course. It has a very good placement cell. If students do well in their semester exams and gain a good CGPA, then for sure they will placed in good company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and computers are available. The canteen is also available. It has very good facilities. The canteen is not big and it is of small size but you get very good and delicious food. There is enough space for sitting outside the college area. If we feel bored then a park is also available near the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A fine college for those who are looking for affordable options.

review_content.Placements: I've talked to my seniors who have passed out, and some of them who were actually deserving have gotten fair placements, mostly from reputable companies. Recruiters from reputed and well-known companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Tata, and others visit our college. Almost 30% to 40% of students get internships. Roles in finance, marketing, and HR management are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is built on a quite big area, but the buildings and infrastructure aren't that lavish; it seems more like a government college. Though there's AC in every classroom, and we're provided with computer lab facilities too. There's no canteen, no medical facilities, or any area for sports and games available in our college.

review_summary.college_name: George College, George Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good practical learning with supportive faculty and a beautiful college life.

content.Placements: We recently completed our course at George College. Around 80% of students from our course got placed through campus placements. It charges 2.5 lakhs for a 3-year course. All students received internship opportunities in many government hospitals. Mostly, lab technician and phlebotomist roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has well-equipped laboratories with modern instruments useful for practical learning. Classrooms are spacious and have projectors for presentations. Wi-Fi is available in most areas of the campus. The library is good with a decent collection of books related to medical lab technology and other references.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: George Group of Colleges are good and best college in MAKAUT University. It is a better place.

content.Placements: 70% of students get placed in my college. The highest package is 15 LPA, the lowest is 5 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Tata Motors, Dell, Vivo, etc., hire students. As freshers, students are welcomed into this college and get nice and perfect placements. And get a higher degree from this college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. The library is good and disciplined. All technical courses are available in this college like BBA, B.com, B.Voc, Mechanical Engineering, and many more. This college is value for money and the best college I have ever seen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the college facilities and the staff members.

content.Placements: 60% of students get placed in our course. Top roles like HR and auditor are offered. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, and Football visit the college to hire students from our course. It has a very good placement cell. If students do well in their semester exams and gain a good CGPA, then for sure they will placed in good company.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and computers are available. The canteen is also available. It has very good facilities. The canteen is not big and it is of small size but you get very good and delicious food. There is enough space for sitting outside the college area. If we feel bored then a park is also available near the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A fine college for those who are looking for affordable options.

content.Placements: I've talked to my seniors who have passed out, and some of them who were actually deserving have gotten fair placements, mostly from reputable companies. Recruiters from reputed and well-known companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Tata, and others visit our college. Almost 30% to 40% of students get internships. Roles in finance, marketing, and HR management are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is built on a quite big area, but the buildings and infrastructure aren't that lavish; it seems more like a government college. Though there's AC in every classroom, and we're provided with computer lab facilities too. There's no canteen, no medical facilities, or any area for sports and games available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: About 65% of students get placed in our college. The salary package offered is 3.5 LPA - 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS and CTS. About 60% of students got internships in TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good. Wi-Fi connections are also good. In every room, we get Wi-Fi. Classrooms are clean. There is no canteen in our college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. The course curriculum is almost relevant. The pass percentage is 85%. Exams are easy. If you want to pass your exam, you have to study carefully. Teachers help us during exams and give suggestions.

admission_process.title: George College, George Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: George College, George Group of Colleges admissionsare merit-based. The college offers admission to candidates as per the norms laid down by MAKAUT/ Management of George Group of Colleges.George College, George Group of Collegesoffers courses at UG, PG, diploma and certificate levels. The college under theGeorge Group of Collegesoffers programmes across various streams such as Science, Computer Applications, etc. Candidates who wish to apply for admission can fill out the application form online.

The college offers more than 15 courses at multiple levels. George College, George Group of Colleges offers courses in affiliation withMAKAUT. Candidates interested in getting admission in any of the accepted courses must fill out the form on the college's website. Below are the key highlights related toGeorge College, George Group of Colleges admissions:
Particulars
George College, George Group of Colleges Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://www.georgecollege.org/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
BBA| BCA|MSc

Candidates are offered a seat in the George College, George Group of Colleges based on their qualifying exam scores. Aspirants should also fulfil the eligibility requirements for the course they wish to apply for. The minimum qualification required for a UG course is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are popularGeorge College, George Group of Colleges coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Admissions are currently open for all courses at George College, George Group of Colleges. Candidates are offered admission based on their score in the qualifying exam. Candidates must fill out the form for the preferred course to be eligible for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat atGeorge College, George Group of Colleges:

Step 1:Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility criteria specified by the college for admission. Aspirants must first register to generate login credentials and then fill out the details to submit the application form. The college only accepts applications of the eligible candidates.
Step 2:Geroge College of Management and Science selects candidates for admission based on their merit. Aspirants must have relevant documents proving their eligibility for admission in the college.
Step 3:The college confirms the admission of the aspirants via email or SMS. Selected candidates need to pay theGeorge College, George Group of Colleges feeto confirm their seat in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It has good practical learning with supportive faculty and a beautiful college life.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped laboratories with modern instruments useful for practical learning. Classrooms are spacious and have projectors for presentations. Wi-Fi is available in most areas of the campus. The library is good with a decent collection of books related to medical lab technology and other references.

reviews.review_heading: George Group of Colleges are good and best college in MAKAUT University. It is a better place.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. The library is good and disciplined. All technical courses are available in this college like BBA, B.com, B.Voc, Mechanical Engineering, and many more. This college is value for money and the best college I have ever seen.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college facilities and the staff members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and computers are available. The canteen is also available. It has very good facilities. The canteen is not big and it is of small size but you get very good and delicious food. There is enough space for sitting outside the college area. If we feel bored then a park is also available near the college.

reviews.review_heading: A fine college for those who are looking for affordable options.
reviews.review_text: Our college is built on a quite big area, but the buildings and infrastructure aren't that lavish; it seems more like a government college. Though there's AC in every classroom, and we're provided with computer lab facilities too. There's no canteen, no medical facilities, or any area for sports and games available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good. Wi-Fi connections are also good. In every room, we get Wi-Fi. Classrooms are clean. There is no canteen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: George College's infrastructure is too good and placement opportunities are excellent.
reviews.review_text: Our college's infrastructure is too good as compared to others. In our college, there are well-decorated classrooms with air conditioner, projectors in each and every room, and good computer labs. Our college doesn't have any hostel facility. Our college doesn't have any canteen. But the railway station is 5 minutes of walking distance from our college.

reviews.review_heading: George College gave us proper guidance.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in classrooms, labs, and the library are excellent. The medical facilities are good, and they have courses like sports management. So they have teams in sports and games. There is no canteen, so we had to bring our own food.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of its placements.
reviews.review_text: In this college, laboratories, canteen, community hall, and seminar rooms were not provided. The classroom with air-conditioner and non-air-conditioner classrooms were also available. The computer laboratory, library, and placements cell were also not provided. There was no hostel facility. The quality of the food in the canteen was average. There were no medical facilities. Sports and games facilities were not provided.

reviews.review_heading: George College, George Group of Colleges is very good.
reviews.review_text: We have an air-conditioned room. In our area, George Group of Colleges has a reputation of being one of the good colleges so for counseling this was my first choice because it was the nearest to my home which is affiliated with Calcutta University.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied in any aspect from this college.
reviews.review_text: I don't know about the hostel but as far the infrastructure is concerned it is so poor as compared to our semester fees. They demand excessive semester fee according to this college. The food quality in the canteen is really bad but the price is so high. No extra room for indoor games or sports.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college to pursue management study. Placements are good, and course fees are reasonable.
reviews.review_text: Our college has more than 50 classrooms, and most of them are air-conditioned. There is a library, but Wi-Fi does not work always. There is an average standard canteen in the college campus. The hostel is not available inside the college campus, but the local mess is available in Phulbagan, Dumdum. There are computer labs and standard labs for other departments. Basic medical facilities are available, and the NRS medical college hospital is available just 2 minutes of distance from our college. ...

reviews.review_heading: Simply awesome experience.
reviews.review_text: Each department has an individual lab. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and every student will get a book bank service from the college library. If they need any reference book, they can collect it from the library for 1 week. After that, he/she have to submit the book.

reviews.review_heading: Review of George Group of Colleges, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with facilities like Wi-Fi, projectors, classrooms and library. The campus should also have a playground, common room and canteen. Washrooms are good. Classrooms are well designed and have air-conditioners and lights. Water facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure. Our college has a big campus, many classrooms, and a big auditorium. Our college is ragging free, and we do share a friendly atmosphere with all the students in the college. We never get hurt by any of the staff and teachers of the college.

reviews.review_heading: From This College you all can get a chance to be a professional in your future.
reviews.review_text: Our College infrastructure is very friendly for all the students. There are many facilities huge amount of classrooms, A big library, all the labs are too good, and yes also sports. Important thing is that the medical facilities in our college. Our college is best from all side.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, infrastructure, placement but don't expect any type of experience from faculty

review_content.Placements: 1) Almost 30% students placed from my batch. 2) Highest salary 25000, lowest 20000 per month was offered. 3) HERO, COCACOLA, TCS are the top recruiters. 4) Senior engineer, Technician, junior engineer, Deptt head are the job roles offered. 5)the highest package 3 lakh, the lowest 2.4 Lacs offered to our course. 6) No internship provide by college. All students have their own internship in the companies like Sonalika, tata motors, hero etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1) Course B.Tech department mechanical Facilities: Wi-Fi, labs, smart classes lab, Big ground, Personality development classes free of cost, College fest etc. Infrastructure: Campus in almost 8 acres, well auditorium, Gym, Well stiiting space, Good chairs, The college also provides residential facilities for the Principal, teaching faculty and non teaching staff.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Sai Group of Institutes - Badhani Campus.

review_content.Placements: None of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month in government job fair and based on diploma certificate but not from the engineering background. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 5,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 7,500 per month. Many companies visit our college during the government job fair, but none of the companies visits for our course to offer placements in the last semester. The top roles offered in our course is a normal worker (due to diploma certificate). I didn't remember about the salary packages offered in our course as they are not mentioned on my college website. Approximately all students got internships from our course, but they all got on their own arrangements. Our college didn't make even a single arrangement for internships.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sri Sai Group of Institutes, Badhani a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sri Sai Group of Institutes, Badhani is a reputed institute for B.Sc., Certificate, UG Diploma, B.Com, B.Ed, M.Ed, B.Tech, BBA, BCA, M.Pharma, M.Sc., M.E./M.Tech, B.Arch, MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Hospitality & Travel, Teaching & Education, Engineering, Accounting & Commerce, Science, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Medicine & Health Sciences, Architecture & Planning. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Sri Sai Group of Institutes, Badhani has a review rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 2.8 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Sai Group of Institutes, Badhani Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good environment and decent teachers.

content.Placements: Placements are decent on our campus. You can expect a salary package between 3 LPA - 8 LPA. Recruiting companies are Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and telecom and IT companies. I have seen some of our seniors getting internships off campus in well-known companies. Still, it depends on how well you are good in your work.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs, and libraries are well-maintained. The infrastructure of our college is well established, with good Wi-Fi system. The food served in the canteen is good and services are regular, maintaining hygiene properly. Sports days are held every year with number of game options.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it was a good experience in this college.

content.Placements: Mostly, students who fall in the 80% category were chosen for placements. A salary package of 1 LPA was available in initial stage. Wipro and other reputed companies came for placements. Mainly 30% of students got placements from this college. Overall, it was a good experience.
content.Infrastructure: Good quality rooms were available with a clean mess facility. Good quality food was available. The canteen also provided lots of variety of food. The library was also available in hostel. A Wi-Fi facility was also available. Playgrounds were available for hostellers along with a medical room facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Good college, infrastructure, placement but don't expect any type of experience from faculty

content.Placements: 1) Almost 30% students placed from my batch. 2) Highest salary 25000, lowest 20000 per month was offered. 3) HERO, COCACOLA, TCS are the top recruiters. 4) Senior engineer, Technician, junior engineer, Deptt head are the job roles offered. 5)the highest package 3 lakh, the lowest 2.4 Lacs offered to our course. 6) No internship provide by college. All students have their own internship in the companies like Sonalika, tata motors, hero etc.
content.Infrastructure: 1) Course B.Tech department mechanical Facilities: Wi-Fi, labs, smart classes lab, Big ground, Personality development classes free of cost, College fest etc. Infrastructure: Campus in almost 8 acres, well auditorium, Gym, Well stiiting space, Good chairs, The college also provides residential facilities for the Principal, teaching faculty and non teaching staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Sai Group of Institutes - Badhani Campus.

content.Placements: None of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month in government job fair and based on diploma certificate but not from the engineering background. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 5,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 7,500 per month. Many companies visit our college during the government job fair, but none of the companies visits for our course to offer placements in the last semester. The top roles offered in our course is a normal worker (due to diploma certificate). I didn't remember about the salary packages offered in our course as they are not mentioned on my college website. Approximately all students got internships from our course, but they all got on their own arrangements. Our college didn't make even a single arrangement for internships.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with placements.

content.Placements: There are no placements at all. The college does not provide placements, you have to search yourself. In 4 years of the college, only one company came and hired none of the students. The salary offered was only 1.5 Lacs p.a. The internship was given to the students of Himachal that was by Himachal government.
content.Infrastructure: The college had a gym, auditorium, football and cricket field, and basketball court. The food quality in the hostel was average. Hostel rooms were damp because of water leakage. The cleaning team of the hostel is good, they have laundry system as well. The medical facilities were not there in college, they used to take students 15km away to some doctor or hospital in case of emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good environment and decent teachers.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, and libraries are well-maintained. The infrastructure of our college is well established, with good Wi-Fi system. The food served in the canteen is good and services are regular, maintaining hygiene properly. Sports days are held every year with number of game options.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it was a good experience in this college.
reviews.review_text: Good quality rooms were available with a clean mess facility. Good quality food was available. The canteen also provided lots of variety of food. The library was also available in hostel. A Wi-Fi facility was also available. Playgrounds were available for hostellers along with a medical room facility.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, infrastructure, placement but don't expect any type of experience from faculty
reviews.review_text:
1) Course B.Tech department mechanical
Facilities: Wi-Fi, labs, smart classes lab, Big ground, Personality development classes free of cost, College fest etc.
Infrastructure: Campus in almost 8 acres, well auditorium, Gym, Well stiiting space, Good chairs, The college also provides residential facilities for the Principal, teaching faculty and non teaching staff.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Sai Group of Institutes - Badhani Campus.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms infrastructure is average, and some desks are broken in almost every classroom. There are also defective fans. In lab's, about 50-100% of machines are defective and are not replaced by college authority for a long time. In the library, books are outdated, and the management is very poor. There are no computers for records, and only 1 hour is assigned to issue and return of books respectively on a working day. I was a day scholar, but I have heard the reviews of hostelers that the infr...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The college had a gym, auditorium, football and cricket field, and basketball court. The food quality in the hostel was average. Hostel rooms were damp because of water leakage. The cleaning team of the hostel is good, they have laundry system as well. The medical facilities were not there in college, they used to take students 15km away to some doctor or hospital in case of emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of failed education system and non helpful nature of faculty.
reviews.review_text: If you believe by seeing the shining buildings and the view of the campus, my college is very good in that respective. However, if you look deep inside, our campus don't have working laboratories or equipment. We are just good in showing off the outer beauty of buildings etc.

reviews.review_heading: Description of the one of the best colleges of Pathankot. We enjoyed the heritage here.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is very good.
The classrooms are fully-equipped with Wi-Fi.
Sports facilities are good.

We can see that during the athletic fest.
All the labs have the full specification.
The library also provides most of the books we require during our academics.

reviews.review_heading: It has a very good infrastructure, staff and learning experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good and well maintained. Advance learning and hi-tech classrooms are there. The infrastructure of the hostels is great as it is having 2 sharing spacious rooms with attached washrooms. In the hostels, we have hot and cold water facility, but food in a mess is not that much good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not only good in studies, it also supports students for extra activities, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There is a very healthy and peaceful environment in our college. Every department has good facilities. The whole college building is fully Wi-Fi enabled. There is a cafeteria where students can throw parties, celebrate birthdays and have lunch with many other kinds of things available here.

The college is very nice and well built. I am happy to be a graduate here. But we are not give scholarships on the basis of merit and even placements are also not done. The best thing about college is the college ground, large campus and faculty. Lecturers are very cooperative and are highly educative. On the whole it is a good experience to study here. The college is very nice and well built. I am happy to be a graduate here. But we are not give scholarships on the basis of merit and even placements are also not done. The best thing about college is the college ground, large campus and faculty. Lecturers are very cooperative and are highly educative. On the whole it is a good experience to study here.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our department are not too much good or we can say that it is average. There are no Wi-Fi facilities for the students in college but in hostels it is available and the students do not need to pay for Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was excellent. The library was well-maintained. Our college had a good canteen and a sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfy with college taking pain creating a good engineer.
reviews.review_text: The campus has good infrastructure as there is Wi-Fi facility all over the campus. The labs are quite equipped. The college has different sports section with court of various games such as badminton, table tennis, etc. The classrooms are quite airy and lightened so that there is good visibility and no suffocation.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good study and good placement.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms had a pleasant environment. Medical labs used to be very neat and clean. Library in the college was good, and all the necessary books of different writers are available. The playground was available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Inexperienced faculty, they hire teachers with 0 year experience.
reviews.review_text: Broken desks, broken classrooms, Wi-Fi available, Hostel is in a very bad condition, no canteen, but it will open maybe this year. Labs are very dirty. I faced many problems due to infrastructure such as toilets are in very bad condition, they want only money and fill their own pockets, no work for school. Yes, it's like a school. Not college. Once your certificates are taken, it will not be given back, it will be given back after 3-4 years, i.e after your course ends.

faqs.question: Does Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.A.M.S. and D.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital offers MD. The fees for Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital courses range between INR 8,10,000 to 19,50,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Babe Ke Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: After B.A.M.S., you can be appointed as a consultant in hospitals and also you can be a pharmacist and MO in hospitals. B.A.M.S. has a very high ranking now in the medical sector because of its low rate of failure in medicine, and also its cost is low.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and is located in a good area. There are huge farming areas and not any industry, so there isn't any crowd. There is a good atmosphere on the campus and no ragging issues.
review_content.Faculty: The best staff are available with good teaching experience. It is the only one college in North which offers MD. It has a good name in Ayurveda society, and it is the best college in North because it works on charity. The founder of the college is a well-known social worker.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Self-practice option is available here. Government jobs are available in government hospitals. All students got an internship after completing their bachelor course, and master's degree option is also available. After completing a bachelor's of ayurvedic and medicine, we can choose ayurvedic or modern medicines.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides smart classes and library, and classrooms are also good. Our college building is good. Quality of food is good, but the canteen facility is quite average. Sports and games are not good, but medical facilities are average. Attach washrooms are not available, and the infrastructure of the hostel is also average.

highlights.summary: Situated in Balaghat city, Madhya Pradesh, Sardar Patel University was founded in year 2018 as a private college. A leading institute in the city offers 72 courses of Degree. Sardar Patel University, Balaghat is a well-known institution for UG, PG and After 10th courses, These programs delivered by a highly experienced faculty. Candidate can pursue in multiple range of courses like B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc., M.Sc., B.A., M.A., B.Com, M.Com, BCA, MCA, B.Ed, M.Ed, BFA, MFA, BBA, B.J.M.C., M.J.M.C., B.Lib.Sc., M.Lib.Sc., M.E./M.Tech, BSW, MSW, After 10th Diploma, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, D.Pharma, M.Pharma, B.Pharma, D.El.Ed with the stream of Engineering, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, Teaching & Education, Accounting & Commerce, IT & Software, Design, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Hospitality & Travel, Mass Communication & Media, Business & Management Studies, Beauty & Fitness, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute give offer to students to gain proficiency & expertise in the specialization of Food Technology. Most importantly, these courses with 664 seats are imparted at affordable fees with range of INR 11,000-261,500, which increase accessibility and allow students the opportunity to gain knowledge and skills in their chosen field.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: How is the scope of microbiology?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of microbiology is huge because of the involvement of microbiology in various fields such as Pharmacy, Medicine, clinical research, agriculture, dairy industry, water industry, nanotechnology & chemical technology. A person who specialises in this field is called a Microbiologist. Some of the Jobs in this field are mentioned below -1. Biomedical scientist2. Bio technologist3. Clinical research associate4. Food technologist5. Healthcare scientist, immunology6. Medicinal chemist7. Microbiologist8. Nano technologist.

review_summary.college_name: Sardar Patel University, Balaghat Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is good you can take admission in this college, for budget friendly studies.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in my course. 5 LPA is the highest package, 2 LPA is average package, and 1 LPA is the lowest package. TCS and Wipro types of companies recruiting for my course. 20% of students got internships from my course at Wipro. Civil engineer role is offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: All types of facilities and infrastructure are good enough in my course like Wi-Fi. Labs are available. Hostel is not available in my college but you can take PG or rented room near this college. Buses and transport are not available, you can use your own transport source to reach the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied and value of money.

content.Placements: Top recruiters are IBM, Persistent, Wipro, Emphasis, Hettich, Infosys. Based on the performance of students in the written test, GD round, and interview, they will be offered placements in different companies with varying salary packages. The average package was around 5 to 8 Lacs.
content.Infrastructure: Provides separate hostels for boys and girls. All the hostel rooms are provided with basic furniture and facilities. Mess facilities are also available for hostellers, which serves good quality and hygienic food at a cheap price. It's around 3000/month. The college also has a canteen facility for staff and students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The campus is large and beautiful. Faculty is also nice.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in our B.Sc. batch in biology and chemistry. There can be various types of packages offered in my course; the lowest can be around INR 10 thousand per month, and the highest can be around INR 1 lac to 1.5 lac per month. Companies like Tata, etc., visit for recruitment. Around 60% of students had internships at Tata, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities that we get are good, and the infrastructure is really amazing. The campus is also big; there are labs with almost every piece of equipment, and a library is also available from time to time with every book needed for the study. The problem is the mess; the food quality is the main problem. The quality of food goes up and down from time to time. Medical facilities are great. Sports are also being played, and they are held from time to time, as in summer vacation, with many games such as cricket, basketball, kabaddi, kho-kho, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good with good faculty members.

content.Placements: B.Sc. is not for placements. I'm satisfied with college.
content.Infrastructure: College has a good infrastructure. Campus is very good and away from the noise with a calm environment. Library is enough for students. Labs are good. Classrooms are very good and very comfortable. Other things are above-average.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, well qualified, and knowledgeable. Teaching quality was good but not all the teachers. The course curriculum is relevant. The level of semester exams was medium.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members.

content.Placements: There are around 60 students in the B. Pharma course. It is an excellent course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month & the average salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Dabur, Zydus, Baidhnath, Cipla, Mankind, etc., are the companies recruiting from our college. Around 6% of the students got internships from our course from Cipla, Dabur, Mankind. Top roles offered are courses like biotechnology senior research scientist, research scientist. Pharmaceutical field sales representative, and pharmaceutical functional analyst.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available to our students in our college. We have the proper equipment for all the major sports like basketball, football, gymnastics, badminton, and tennis, along with other indoor sports like carrom, chess, table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_text: All types of facilities and infrastructure are good enough in my course like Wi-Fi. Labs are available. Hostel is not available in my college but you can take PG or rented room near this college. Buses and transport are not available, you can use your own transport source to reach the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and value of money.
reviews.review_text: Provides separate hostels for boys and girls. All the hostel rooms are provided with basic furniture and facilities. Mess facilities are also available for hostellers, which serves good quality and hygienic food at a cheap price. It's around 3000/month. The college also has a canteen facility for staff and students.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is large and beautiful. Faculty is also nice.
reviews.review_text: The facilities that we get are good, and the infrastructure is really amazing. The campus is also big; there are labs with almost every piece of equipment, and a library is also available from time to time with every book needed for the study. The problem is the mess; the food quality is the main problem. The quality of food goes up and down from time to time. Medical facilities are great. Sports are also being played, and they are held from time to time, as in summer vacation, with many games s...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: College has a good infrastructure. Campus is very good and away from the noise with a calm environment. Library is enough for students. Labs are good. Classrooms are very good and very comfortable. Other things are above-average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available to our students in our college. We have the proper equipment for all the major sports like basketball, football, gymnastics, badminton, and tennis, along with other indoor sports like carrom, chess, table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with college facilities, low placement in 2023, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good than most of the college in surrounding area. There are many green areas on the campus, and many trees. But the building in which the students study is quite small. I will not say anything about the open area, there is sufficient space.

The 3rd round of seat allotment for Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation Post Graduate Institute NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been announced for MD, MS programmes for various categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 723 to 58745, with MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy being the most challenging for admission. To see more information, students can check out the table below.

Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation Post Graduate Institute accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy, with a round 3 closing rank of 723 for the General AI category. In contrast, the cutoff for the OBC AI category for the same specialisation was 3122.

Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences and Science. reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Applied Psychology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for M.Sc. in applied Psychology courses.

review_content.Placements: Our college had a great placement and recruitment rate. Additionally, they provided students training and other initiatives to help them get that placement. The administration of the college offered the students a great deal of assistance. To help pupils reach their full potential, they provided additional training sessions.
review_content.Infrastructure: Structures were still being built. However, the infrastructure and facilities were still in decent condition. Labs and classrooms were fine. Both the café and the library were excellent. The Wi-Fi connection worked well. The amenities in the hostel were passable. Food was fine; however, a few more items could have been added to the menu.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. (Hons.) International Accounting + ACCA - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The university may not satisfy everyone, but it is good and has enough facilities.

review_content.Placements: There are around 40 students on my campus, and around or fewer than 100 on the other campus. The highest salary offered will be 3.5 LPA, but I’m not sure about the fees after the scholarship. I'm also unsure about the recruiting companies. The top roles offered in the course would be ACCA for those who complete the ACCA course, along with any accounts-related job, or a basic B.Com degree course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but is a very slow connection. The canteen provides good food and different options but the canteen on one campus (onakoor) is very far from the main campus, it is on top of a hill. Computers are a bit slow in the WR campus. There is no proper playground on the WR campus, but basketball and badminton courts are available. Sports equipment is available. Onakoor campus has a proper playground and equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. (Hons.) International Accounting + ACCA - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college with a below average campus.

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are EY, IBM, and TCS. A lot of students are placed in this course. There are two batches in total divided into two campuses, and there are over 100 students in this course. Almost all students get internships from our course in their 2nd year and 3rd year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent, but the campus is small. The Wi-Fi is very bad and barely useful, it is very slow and has barely any range. The library is good, and AC is available. The classrooms are literal ovens and deep frying students. I wish there could be AC in classrooms.

review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is of good class and the value for the fee provided is given here. Infrastructure and college hostels are superb with a veg menu. review_content.Placements: As far as I heard our college provides good placements. Students from our course got offer letters for batch universities and great internships. We have an internship department to help students get internships and guide them through the process.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. (Hons.) International Accounting + ACCA - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Very few programs, less spacious, and low placements.

review_content.Placements: The strength of students placed in our course is 40. The average package offered for our course is 40000–100000. Top recruiting companies for our course are the big four, which are Deloitte, KPMG, EY, and PwC. The students got internship from companies such as Apple, Google, etc. The roles that are offered in this course are financial analyst, management accountant, auditor, finance manager, CFO and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided by the college is of good quality. There is free wi-fi, air-conditioned labs and a library. The library offers a variety of journals and books for references, as well as systems for study materials. The hostel is not that clean, and the college canteen offers a variety of products. Extracurricular activities are provided up to a limit but lack of space is a big demerit.

content.Placements: Our college had a great placement and recruitment rate. Additionally, they provided students training and other initiatives to help them get that placement. The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG, PG and After 10th level in the field of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Science and Teaching and Education. Read below for more details on Venkateshwara Group of Institutions admission process:

courses_data.name: Venkateshwara Group of Institutions B.Ed Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Venkateshwara Group of Institutionsoffers a 2 years B.Ed programme at the UG level. The course is divided into 4 semesters. Aspirants are offered admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Check below the eligibility criteria for B.Ed:

courses_data.name: Venkateshwara Group of Institutions B.Sc. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: AtVenkateshwara Group of Institutions, students can enrol in B.Sc. at UG level. Admission to the course is made on both merit and entrance basis. The B.Sc. is offered in Biotechnology, Food Technology and Agriculture specialisation. The Venkateshwara Group of Institutions B.Sc. fee isINR 1,00,000depending upon the specialisation. Find below the key highlights for Venkateshwara Group of Institutions B.Sc.:

courses_data.name: Venkateshwara Group of Institutions B.Pharma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the UG level,Venkateshwara Group of Institutionsoffers B.Pharma in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 4 years. The curriculum is divided into 8 semesters. Venkateshwara Group of Institutions B.Pharma admissions are merit-based and students are required to complete graduation. Some other key highlights for Venkateshwara Group of Institutions B.Pharma admissions are given below: Venkateshwara Group of Institutions B.Pharma fees isINR 2,82,000and includes caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of these are charged only once during admissions. hostel_campus.college_name: Venkateshwara Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: All the institute have their own hostels and offers basic facilities like food, laundry, entertainment, gym, medical facility, telephone connectivity etc. Yoga and meditation classes are held on a daily basis.

library.description: All the institutions of Venkateshwara Group have well stocked and full computerized multimedia libraries. The library has a rich collection of books, national and international journals, magazines, periodicals etc.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground
